languages.text: {n}Зрачки хирургеона Мартинакса расширяются. Он делает опасливый шаг вперед и замирает.{/n} "Немыслимо! Поколения хирургеонов трудились здесь и не знали..."
{n}Vivisector Martinax's pupils dilate. He takes a wary step forward and freezes.{/n} "Incredible! Generations of chirurgeons have toiled away here and were utterly unaware..."
languages.original_text: {n}Зрачки хирургеона Мартинакса расширяются. Он делает опасливый шаг вперед и замирает.{/n} "Немыслимо! Поколения хирургеонов трудились здесь и не знали..."

{n}Vivisector Martinax's pupils dilate. He takes a wary step forward and freezes.{/n} "Incredible! Generations of chirurgeons have toiled away here and were utterly unaware..."

languages.text: {n}Las pupilas del vivisector Martinax se dilatan. Da un cauteloso paso al frente y se detiene.{/n} «¡Increíble! Generaciones enteras han trabajado aquí sin darse cuenta...».
languages.original_text: {n}Vivisector Martinax's pupils dilate. He takes a wary step forward and freezes.{/n} "Incredible! Generations of chirurgeons have toiled away here and were utterly unaware..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Las pupilas del vivisector Martinax se dilatan. Da un cauteloso paso al frente y se detiene.{/n} «¡Increíble! Generaciones enteras han trabajado aquí sin darse cuenta...».

languages.text: {n}解剖者马丁纳克斯的瞳孔猛然放大。他警惕地向前迈了一步，又僵在原地。{/n}“太不可思议了！一代代船医在此处辛勤劳作，竟全然不知……”
languages.original_text: {n}Vivisector Martinax's pupils dilate. He takes a wary step forward and freezes.{/n} "Incredible! Generations of chirurgeons have toiled away here and were utterly unaware..."

traits.locale_text: {n}解剖者马丁纳克斯的瞳孔猛然放大。他警惕地向前迈了一步，又僵在原地。{/n}“太不可思议了！一代代船医在此处辛勤劳作，竟全然不知……”

languages.text: {n}Les pupilles du vivisecteur Martinax se dilatent et il avance avec circonspection avant de s'immobiliser.{/n} « Incroyable ! Des générations de chirurgeons ont travaillé sur ce pont sans se douter un seul instant que... »
languages.original_text: {n}Vivisector Martinax's pupils dilate. He takes a wary step forward and freezes.{/n} "Incredible! Generations of chirurgeons have toiled away here and were utterly unaware..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Les pupilles du vivisecteur Martinax se dilatent et il avance avec circonspection avant de s'immobiliser.{/n} « Incroyable ! Des générations de chirurgeons ont travaillé sur ce pont sans se douter un seul instant que... »

languages.text: {n}Dirikesimci Martinax'ın göz bebekleri büyüyor. Temkinli bir şekilde adım atıp donakalıyor.{/n} "İnanılmaz! Nesiller boyu cerrahlar burada didindiler ve bundan habersizdiler..."
languages.original_text: {n}Vivisector Martinax's pupils dilate. He takes a wary step forward and freezes.{/n} "Incredible! Generations of chirurgeons have toiled away here and were utterly unaware..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dirikesimci Martinax'ın göz bebekleri büyüyor. Temkinli bir şekilde adım atıp donakalıyor.{/n} "İnanılmaz! Nesiller boyu cerrahlar burada didindiler ve bundan habersizdiler..."

languages.text: {n}マルタナスは瞳を大きく見開いた。一歩前に進み、警戒しながら立ち止まった。{/n}「信じられない！何世代もの外科医がここに尽力し、全く気づかなかったとは…」
languages.original_text: {n}Vivisector Martinax's pupils dilate. He takes a wary step forward and freezes.{/n} "Incredible! Generations of chirurgeons have toiled away here and were utterly unaware..."

traits.locale_text: {n}マルタナスは瞳を大きく見開いた。一歩前に進み、警戒しながら立ち止まった。{/n}「信じられない！何世代もの外科医がここに尽力し、全く気づかなかったとは…」

languages.text: {n}Die Pupillen von Vivisektor Martinax weiten sich. Er tritt vorsichtig vor und erstarrt.{/n} "Unglaublich! Generationen von Chirurgeums haben sich hier abgemüht und ahnten nicht ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Vivisector Martinax's pupils dilate. He takes a wary step forward and freezes.{/n} "Incredible! Generations of chirurgeons have toiled away here and were utterly unaware..."
